mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(MEMBER_ID) FROM DELI_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT MEMBER_NO , MEMBER_NAME FROM DELI_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_NO = ( SELECT MEMBER_NO FROM DELI_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND MEMBER_PW = #{memberPw} )
SELECT MEMBER_NO FROM DELI_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
